findings.message: Breaking schema change: field 'name' renamed to 'title' without backwards compatibility. Existing GraphQL clients querying the 'name' field will break.
findings.suggestion: Provide backwards compatibility by keeping 'name' as a deprecated alias to 'title', or implement a migration path for clients using the old field name.

findings.message: GraphQL-REST API divergence: the GraphQL schema exposes this field as 'title', while the REST API (src/demo/routes/items.py) exposes it as 'name'. This inconsistency can confuse clients.
findings.suggestion: Align the field names across both APIs. Either rename the REST response field to 'title' or keep the GraphQL field as 'name' to match the REST contract.
